revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŇŹk 16 h√īŐ§ (n√Ļng-lń≠k)]][[ja:12śúą16śó• (śóßśö¶)]][[ko:žĚĆŽ†• 12žõĒ 16žĚľ]][[zh-min-nan:12 goeŐćh 16 jiŐćt (kŇę-leŐćk)]][[zh-yue:ŚćĀšļĆśúąŚćĀŚÖ≠]][[zh:ŚćĀšļĆśúąŚćĀŚÖ≠]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 16|qq=December 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=ŚćĀšļĆśúąŚćĀŚÖ≠|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=žĚĆŽ†• 12žõĒ 16žĚľ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|RokuyŇć|ja|ŚÖ≠śõú|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyŇć|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|ŚÖąŤ≤†|1=RokuyŇć|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=RokuyŇć|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ŚÖ≠śõú|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ŚÖ≠śõú|1=RokuyŇć|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|ShŇćhŇć|en|ShŇćhŇć|qid=Q1146192|lt=ShŇćhŇć|1=ShŇćhŇć}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1645|en|1645|qid=Q6925|lt=1645|1=1645}} {{ill|January 13|en|January 13|qid=Q2255|lt=January 13|1=January 13}}) ‚Äď In conjunction with the accession of {{ill|Emperor Go-KŇćmyŇć|en|Emperor Go-KŇćmyŇć|qid=Q329765|lt=Emperor GŇćkŇć|1=Emperor Go-KŇćmyŇć}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} to {{ill|ShŇćhŇć|en|ShŇćhŇć|qid=Q1146192|lt=ShŇćhŇć|1=ShŇćhŇć}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|śĒĻŚÖÉ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}. == Births == * {{ill|JŇćgan|ja|ŚłłŚÖÉ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/JŇćgan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|869|en|869|qid=Q23917|lt=869|1=869}} {{ill|January 2|en|January 2|qid=Q2151|lt=January 2|1=January 2}}) ‚Äď {{ill|Emperor YŇćzei|en|Emperor YŇćzei|qid=Q349280|lt=Emperor YŇćsei|1=Emperor YŇćzei}}, the 57th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|949|en|949|qid=Q24352|lt=949|1=949}}). * {{ill|TenpŇć|en|TenpŇć|qid=Q1369045|lt=TenpŇć|1=TenpŇć}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|January 22|en|January 22|qid=Q2275|lt=January 22|1=January 22}}) ‚Äď {{ill|Nao Deguchi|en|Nao Deguchi|qid=Q956167|lt=Deguchi Nao|1=Nao Deguchi}}, founder of the „ÄźŚ§ßśú¨„ÄĎ (died {{ill|1918|en|1918|qid=Q2094|lt=1918|1=1918}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}} {{ill|January 8|en|January 8|qid=Q2234|lt=January 8|1=January 8}}) ‚Äď {{ill|Shitase Masayoshi|ja|šłčÁÄ¨ťõÖŚÖĀ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shitase Masayoshi|1=Shimose Masachika|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11361136}}, an inventor (died {{ill|1911|en|1911|qid=Q2076|lt=1911|1=1911}}). * {{ill|KeiŇć|en|KeiŇć|qid=Q776775|lt=KeiŇć|1=KeiŇć}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 10|en|January 10|qid=Q2243|lt=January 10|1=January 10}}) ‚Äď {{ill|Ozaki KŇćyŇć|en|Ozaki KŇćyŇć|qid=Q975273|lt=Ozaki KŇćyŇć|1=Ozaki KŇćyŇć}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1903|en|1903|qid=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|ChŇćhŇć (era)|en|ChŇćhŇć (era)|qid=Q1324844|lt=ChŇćhŇć|1=ChŇćhŇć (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1001|en|1001|qid=Q19219|lt=1001|1=1001}} {{ill|January 13|en|January 13|qid=Q2255|lt=January 13|1=January 13}}) ‚Äď {{ill|Fujiwara no Teishi|en|Fujiwara no Teishi|qid=Q1190972|lt=Fujiwara Teishi|1=Fujiwara no Teishi}}, empress of {{ill|Emperor IchijŇć|en|Emperor IchijŇć|qid=Q449540|lt=Emperor IchijŇć|1=Emperor IchijŇć}} (born {{ill|977|en|977|qid=Q23795|lt=977|1=977}}). * {{ill|KyŇęju|en|KyŇęju|qid=Q1194205|lt=KyŇęju|1=KyŇęju}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156|1=1156}} {{ill|January 10|en|January 10|qid=Q2243|lt=January 10|1=January 10}}) ‚Äď {{ill|Kaya-no-in|en|Kaya-no-in|qid=Q4168118|lt=Fujiwara Yasuko|1=Kaya-no-in}}, empress of {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|qid=Q349284|lt=Emperor Toba|1=Emperor Toba}} (born {{ill|1095|en|1095|qid=Q19480|lt=1095|1=1095}}). * {{ill|BunkyŇę|en|BunkyŇę|qid=Q730266|lt=BunkyŇę|1=BunkyŇę}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|January 24|en|January 24|qid=Q2278|lt=January 24|1=January 24}}) ‚Äď {{ill|Aoki ShŇęeki|ja|ťĚíśú®ŚĎ®Á≤•|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki ShŇęeki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a practitioner of Dutch studies (born {{ill|1803|en|1803|qid=Q6887|lt=1803|1=1803}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|15|12|17|11|16|1|12|1216|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
